phases.name: Call Analysis
phases.description: Parse work programme and call topic to extract evaluation criteria, expected outcomes/impacts, scope requirements, eligibility conditions, and evaluation priority weights.

phases.name: Concept Refinement
phases.description: Align the project concept with confirmed call scope, expected outcomes, and expected impacts. Refine concept note and strategic positioning.

phases.name: WP Design & Dependencies
phases.description: Design work package structure: define WPs, tasks, deliverables, inter-WP dependencies, and responsible partners.

phases.name: Gantt & Milestones
phases.description: Produce project timeline: assign tasks to months, define milestones with verifiable criteria, validate timeline fits within duration constraint.

phases.name: Impact Architecture
phases.description: Construct impact narrative: define pathway from project outputs to outcomes to broader impacts, mapped against call expected impact criteria.

phases.name: Implementation Architecture
phases.description: Define implementation approach: management structure, risk management, ethical considerations, consortium governance.

phases.name: Budget Gate
phases.description: Validate external budget response is present, structurally consistent with WP design and consortium. Mandatory gate — bypass prohibited.

phases.name: Drafting & Review
phases.description: Criterion-aligned drafting pipeline: three parallel section drafting nodes (Excellence, Impact, Implementation) converge on cross-section assembly, followed by evaluator-style review and revision cycle. Each section is independently gated with per-criterion completeness checks.
